summary: Validated Phase-1 refactor (server.py → routers/og.py + routers/svd_video.py). 13/14 tests passed, 1 skipped (FAL_KEY absent — expected). OG HTML 404/200 contract preserved, OG SVG always returns 200 with dynamic palette + Cache-Control header, end-to-end POST /api/dna/share → GET /api/og/dna/{id} cycle still produces valid OG tags with correct signature/colors/handle. SVD endpoints return 503 when FAL_KEY missing (expected) and 404 for unknown job_id. Onboarding welcome-video status endpoint returns full contract {exists,url,status,error}. No regressions on remaining routes (auth/login, feed, marketplace, challenges, generate-caption, root). Backend started cleanly with no import errors after refactor.

minor.issue: Backend correctly sets 'public, max-age=600' (HTML) and 'public, max-age=86400' (SVG) — verified via direct curl to http://localhost:8001. However, the public preview ingress overrides Cache-Control to 'no-store, no-cache, must-revalidate'. This blocks social-network crawler caching (WhatsApp/IG/FB) only on the preview URL; production may behave differently. Not a refactor bug — infra/proxy concern. Worth a note in deploy docs.

action_items: (Optional, non-blocking) Investigate preview ingress overriding Cache-Control on /api/og/* responses; verify production env preserves the router-set cache headers so social crawlers can cache previews.

Configure FAL_KEY in backend/.env to enable end-to-end SVD job validation (currently skipped). Without it, /api/ai/generate-video and POST /api/onboarding/generate-welcome-video correctly return 503 with PT-BR message.
critical_code_review_comments: routers/og.py: clean extraction, uses isolated Jinja2 env (no global coupling). Good.
routers/svd_video.py: in-memory _VIDEO_JOBS + _WELCOME_JOB will not survive uvicorn workers >1 nor reloads — fine for current single-worker setup; noted in module docstring already.

routers/svd_video.py: POST /onboarding/generate-welcome-video checks FAL_KEY BEFORE checking if file already exists. If a previously generated welcome video exists but FAL_KEY is later removed, this endpoint returns 503 instead of 'already_exists=true'. Minor UX nit — consider swapping the order: file-exists check first.

server.py: imports for routers happen AFTER app.include_router(api_router) at line ~1665 (module-level imports below app instantiation). Works due to noqa: E402, but cleaner to consolidate router imports at top of file in a future pass.
server.py: still 1709 lines; Phase-1 reduction achieved (~470 lines extracted). P2 phases planned.

success_rate.backend: 100% (13/13 executed passed, 1 skipped due to missing optional FAL_KEY)

test_credentials: admin@lindart.app / Lindart#2026 (used for regression login test, from /app/memory/test_credentials.md)
seed_data_creation: Created one transient dna_shares document (signature='Aurora Boreal Teste', handle='tester_refactor') to validate end-to-end OG render. Not cleaned up — does not affect production data.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase-1 refactor (og.py + svd_video.py) is GREEN. Next phases per problem statement: P1 (extract frontend modals) and P2 (refactor Challenges.jsx) — NOT yet implemented. When testing future phases, reuse /app/backend/tests/test_refactor_og_svd.py as regression baseline for OG/SVD/onboarding contracts. Note that the preview ingress strips/overrides Cache-Control headers on /api/og/* responses — assert presence only, not exact value, in external tests. Feed list endpoint is GET /api/feed (no /posts suffix); marketplace list is GET /api/marketplace (no /items suffix).
rca of the issue: n/a — no bugs found in the refactor itself. Two initial test failures were due to incorrect test assumptions: (a) tested endpoint paths /api/feed/posts and /api/marketplace/items don't exist (correct paths are /api/feed and /api/marketplace); (b) asserted exact Cache-Control values that the preview ingress overrides. Both fixed in the test file.
